title: No test for same-note re-selection on SaveFailedState preserving error state
description: REQ-EPNS-005 explicitly states: 'When same-note is detected on SaveFailedState, the guard emits EditorFocusedOnPastNote but does NOT clear the save-failed status or error. The EditingSessionState remains in save-failed status'. This is a critical edge case (same-note on SaveFailedState). There is no test in pipeline.test.ts or anywhere else that verifies this behavior. The existing same-note test (PROP-EPNS-010, line 347) only tests with EditingState, not SaveFailedState. A test must verify that when SaveFailedState.currentNoteId === selection.noteId, the pipeline emits the focus event but the state remains save-failed.

evidence.snippet: currentState: makeEditingState({ currentNoteId: noteId, isDirty: true }),

recommendation: Add a test: SaveFailedState with currentNoteId === selection.noteId. Verify EditorFocusedOnPastNote is emitted, blurSave is NOT called, and the return value does not indicate a new session was created (which relates to FIND-003).
